AAPL.title: Apple (AAPL) Stock After 129% Five-Year Rally Is There Still Value Here
AAPL.summary: If you are wondering whether Apple stock still offers value after its strong run, the answer depends heavily on how you look at price versus fundamentals. At a last close of US$299.24, Apple has returned 3.0% over the past week, was roughly flat over the past month with a 0.3% decline, and has delivered 10.4% year to date, 53.6% over 1 year, 64.0% over 3 years, and 129.1% over 5 years. AAPL.title: Italy opens first DMA probe into Apple over iCloud access

AAPL.title: Apple (AAPL) Faces Italy DMA Probe Over Cloud Interoperability
AAPL.summary: Italy’s competition authority has opened a Digital Markets Act probe into Apple’s cloud service interoperability on iOS and iPadOS. Regulators are examining whether Apple limits third party consumer cloud providers from using certain system features, potentially favoring iCloud. This is the first investigation launched by a national authority under the EU’s Digital Markets Act and focuses on how Apple’s ecosystem interacts with external services.
